description: Template fixture. Copy this file, rename to YOUR-ID.json, fill in real values. The _template.json file is ignored by the test runner (underscore prefix).

profile.text: Full profile text here including resume, target roles, hard constraints, strengths. Paste verbatim from the client_profiles.profile_text column.

job.text: Full job description text here. Paste verbatim from the source posting.
job.companyName: Optional — use this to override extraction with the correct company
job.jobTitle: Optional — use this to override extraction with the correct title

expected.notes: One-line human note describing why this candidate should score this way. Used for future debugging when a test fails.
